title: Serve DID document at /users/{username}/did.json
description: Add GET /users/{username}/did.json route. Response Content-Type: application/did+json. Build DID document via did_web_document() with RSA public key (RsaVerificationKey2018 #main-key) and Ed25519 recovery key (Ed25519VerificationKey2020 #recovery-key, publicKeyMultibase). Include alsoKnownAs with did:key and profile URL. Cache-Control: public, max-age=300. Return 404 for unknown personas or personas without DID.
